mapper.sql: r.id, r.rule_code, r.name, r.app_scenario, r.model_types, r.app_id, a.name AS app_name, r.user_id, u.real_name AS user_real_name, u.username AS user_username, r.fallback_rule_id, r.status
mapper.select:
select from routing_rules r left join apps a on r.app_id = a.id left join users u on r.user_id = u.id and u.is_deleted = 0
and ( r.rule_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or r.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or r.app_scenario like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or a.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or u.real_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or u.username like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
and (
find_in_set(#{type}, r.model_types)
)
order by r.id desc
select from routing_rules r left join apps a on r.app_id = a.id left join users u on r.user_id = u.id and u.is_deleted = 0 where r.id = #{id}

select from routing_rules r inner join routing_rule_consumers rc on r.id = rc.rule_id left join apps a on r.app_id = a.id left join users u on r.user_id = u.id and u.is_deleted = 0 where rc.consumer_id = #{consumerId} and r.status = 'ENABLED' and rc.status = 'ENABLED' order by r.id desc

select from routing_rules r inner join routing_rule_consumers rc on r.id = rc.rule_id left join apps a on r.app_id = a.id left join users u on r.user_id = u.id and u.is_deleted = 0 where rc.consumer_id = #{consumerId} and r.rule_code = #{ruleCode} and r.status = 'ENABLED' and rc.status = 'ENABLED' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into routing_rules(rule_code, name, app_scenario, model_types, app_id, user_id, fallback_rule_id, status) values(#{ruleCode}, #{name}, #{appScenario}, #{modelTypes}, #{appId}, #{userId}, #{fallbackRuleId}, #{status})
mapper.update: update routing_rules set rule_code = #{ruleCode}, name = #{name}, app_scenario = #{appScenario}, model_types = #{modelTypes}, app_id = #{appId}, user_id = #{userId}, fallback_rule_id = #{fallbackRuleId}, status = #{status} where id = #{id}
